summary: Add 'events upcoming' multi-venue fan-out that reads venue IDs from a file, CSV, or saved watchlist and queries the local events table.
reason: Replaces 595 lines of hand-rolled bash (Lobster seattle-events) with one CLI command. The Discovery API has no multi-venue endpoint — without local store + fan-out, agents must loop per-venue and dedup themselves.
validated_outcome: --dry-run pass; --help pass; renders empty-store hint when no events synced.
